mnemonics.title: B-Tree Order
mnemonics.content: B-Tree Order: Maximum Children = m, Minimum Keys = ⌈m/2⌉ - 1 (Remember: 'More Children, Minimum Keys')

visualTips.visualization: Imagine splitting a full node like breaking a cookie - keep the middle (median) and distribute halves to neighbors

analogies.analogy: Like post office boxes - each key (recipient) has designated box (bucket), but multiple letters (collisions) need special handling
